baseline.notes: Run #24 best F1 to date; Run 25 regressed to 0.370 with goal-override (cannibalized shot_stop_diving). Reverting to Run 24 prompt + kickoff-gate bug fix.

notes: Run #26 — Two-part fix: (1) revert Run 25 goal-override prompt clause (too aggressive, cannibalized shot_stop_diving); (2) save-language gate now skips events promoted via kickoff-inference (metadata.kickoff_signal=True). Diagnosed in Run 25: all 9 kickoff-inferred goals in Run 24 were demoted back by save-language gate. Temporal evidence of kickoff-after-save trumps in-window save wording. Expected: goal 4/4 via kickoff rescue (1065s), throw-in/catch gains preserved.
